FatigueContFactorEnum.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

FatigueContFactorEnum_DisplayFre.description: Indicates whether fatigue was a contributing factor in the occurrence, in French.

ImoClasslevelDisplayEng.description: The description of the IMO classification, in English.

ImoClassLevelDisplayFre.description: The description of the IMO classification, in French.

ImoClassLevelID.full_name: International Maritime Organization class level identification number

IncludedInDailyEnum.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

IncludedInDailyEnumDisplayEng.description: Indicates whether the occurrence is included in the TSB's daily notification log, in English.

IncludedInDailyEnumDisplayFre.description: Indicates whether the occurrence is included in the TSB's daily notification log, in French.

InjuriesIND.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

InjuriesIND_DisplayEng.description: Indicates whether the occurrence resulted in any injuries, in English.

InjuriesIND_DisplayFre.description: Indicates whether the occurrence resulted in any injuries, in French.

LatEnum.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

LatEnum_Bearing_DisplayEng.description: Indicates whether the occurrence took place north or south of the equator (N = north; S = south), in English.

LatEnum_Bearing_DisplayFre.description: Indicates whether the occurrence took place north or south of the equator (N = north; S = south), in French.

Latitude.description: The latitude at which the occurrence took place, in decimal degrees. A positive number indicates a latitude in the northern hemisphere; a negative number indicates a latitude in the southern hemisphere.

LightConditionDisplayEng.description: The light conditions at the time of the occurrence, in English.

LightConditionDisplayFre.description: The light conditions at the time of the occurrence, in French.

LightConditionID.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

LongEnum.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

LongEnum_Bearing_DisplayEng.description: Indicates whether the occurrence took place east or west of the meridian (E = east; W = west), in English.

LongEnum_Bearing_DisplayFre.description: Indicates whether the occurrence took place east or west of the meridian (E = east; O = west), in French.

Longitude.description: The longitude at which the occurrence took place, in decimal degrees.   A positive number indicates a longitude in the eastern hemisphere; a negative number indicates a longitude in the western hemisphere.

MajorChangesIncludedInDaily.description: Indicates whether there have been major changes to the occurrence information since it was released in the daily notification report.

NearestLocationDescription.description: The location nearest to where the occurrence took place, in the language in which it was entered in MARSIS.

NearestLocationDistance_Nm.description: The distance in nautical miles between the location indicated in the NearLocDescription field and the actual location of the occurrence, when available. This distance may be included in the NearLocDescription field for records entered before 25 November 2013.

NotificationDetailID.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

ObservedByDisplayEng.description: The role of the person who noticed the presence of ice, in English.

ObservedByDisplayFre.description: The role of the person who noticed the presence of ice, in French.

ObservedByID.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

OccClassDisplayEng.description: The TSB investigation classification of the occurrence, in English.

OccClassDisplayFre.description: The TSB investigation classification of the occurrence, in French.

OccClassID.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

OccClosedDate.description: The date on which the TSB's investigation into the occurrence was closed. Date format is YYYY-MM-DD.

OccDate.description: The date on which the occurrence took place. Date format is YYYY-MM-DD.

OccID.description: The occurrence identification number; a unique identifier for the occurrence assigned by MARSIS.

OccNo.description: The TSB occurrence number; a unique identifier for the occurrence. The "M" is to identify Marine mode followed by 2 digits to identify the year of the occurrence. The letter after the year is to identify the TSB region responsible for investigating the occurrence. This is followed by the sequential number assigned by the MARSIS application.

OccTime.description: The time at which the occurrence took place. Time format is hh:mm (24-hour clock).

OccTypeDisplayEng.description: Indicates whether the occurrence was an accident or reportable incident, in English.

OccTypeDisplayFre.description: Indicated whether the occurrence was an accident or reportable incident, in French.

OtherStateInvestigatingDisplayEng.description: The other state that is investigating the occurrence, if applicable, in English.

OtherStateInvestigatingDisplayFre.description: The other state that is investigating the occurrence, if applicable, in French.

OtherStateInvestigatingID.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

PollutionIND.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

PollutionIND_DisplayEng.description: Indicates whether there was pollution associated with the occurrence, in English.

PollutionIND_DisplayFre.description: Indicates whether there was pollution associated with the occurrence, in French.

Position.description: The geographical position where the occurrence was located. The data is displayed as a standard GIS number that can be translated into coordinates in various formats.

PositionEstimatedIND.description: A system-generated number for the purposes of database administration.

PositionEstimatedIND_DisplayEng.description: Indicates whether the occurrence position is estimated, in English.

PositionEstimatedIND_DisplayFre.description: Indicates whether the occurrence position is estimated, in French.

PositionInText.description: The geographical position where the occurrence was located. This is a legacy field from a previous version of MARSIS. This data is now included in the Position field.

PositionTypeDisplayEng.description: The format in which the occurrence position is expressed (DD.DDDD, DDMM.MMM, or DDMMSS.SS), in English.

PositionTypeDisplayFre.description: The format in which the occurrence position is expressed (DD.DDDD, Degrés-Minutes-Minutes, or degrés-Minutes-Secondes-Secondes), in French.

ProvinceDisplayFre.description: The province of the occurrence location, in French.

RegionOfOccurrenceDisplayEng.description: The region in which the occurrence took place (Pacific Region, Central Region, Atlantic Region, or Foreign Waters), in English.

RegionResponsibilityDisplayFre.description: The administrative region of the TSB responsible for investigating the occurrence, in French.

ImoClass.description: Indicates the IMO Classification of an occurrence, based on the IMO Code of International Standards and Recommended Practices for a Safety Investigation into a Marine Casualty or Marine Incident (Casualty Investigation Code).

Length_Meters.description: The length of the vessel, in metres.

LengthTypeDisplayFre.description: Indicates whether the vessel's length is its overall or registered length, in French.
